title: Clinical Laboratory Technician
description: Providence Health is seeking a Clinical Laboratory Technician to perform laboratory testing that helps drive patient care decisions. You'll analyze blood and tissue samples, operate laboratory equipment, and maintain quality standards. Work hybrid in San Francisco for a leading health system dedicated to patient care and community health.
responsibilities: Collect and process laboratory specimens following proper protocols
Operate and maintain laboratory analyzers and equipment
Perform hematology, chemistry, and immunology testing
Ensure quality control and accuracy of test results
Maintain detailed laboratory records and documentation

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Clinical Laboratory Science or Medical Technology
skills: Strong attention to detail and accuracy
Ability to work in fast-paced environment

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
